Yang Xun Ê•äË®ì
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Xun (Ê•äË®ì)was born in Julu. A man of limited ability but honorouble conduct, his memorial accidentally got Cui Yan killed and Mao Jie sacked. Yang Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
